description: This class takes over a few of the Engine methods in order to break down this gigantomanic object.

getSystemTimeISO8601.description: Returns a fully described string of this date and time in milliseconds or ISO-8601 format (using the local timezone) with or without divider characters.

getSystemTimeMs.description: Returns the system time in milliseconds.

ISO8601ToMilliseconds.description: Returns a date string to time in milliseconds.

millisecondsToISO8601.description: Returns a time in milliseconds to a date string.
